name: gitea
description: Interact with Gitea instances - repos, issues, pull requests, releases.
long_description:
Wraps the official gitea-mcp server (https://gitea.com/gitea/gitea-mcp) v1.3.0 as a one-click Claude Desktop extension. Provides ~50 MCP tools for browsing repositories, managing issues and pull requests, reading code, releases, tags, branches, labels, milestones, wiki, packages, and Gitea Actions on any Gitea instance, including self-hosted ones.

Unofficial packaging. The server binaries are built by the upstream Gitea project and re-distributed here verbatim, verified against the upstream SHA256 checksums file.

Supports win32, darwin, and linux on amd64. Apple Silicon and Windows on ARM run via OS-provided emulation (Rosetta 2 / x64 emulation). Native arm64 binaries planned for a future release.

host.title: Gitea host URL
host.description: Base URL of your Gitea instance, e.g. https://gitea.com or https://gitea.example.internal

token.title: Personal access token
token.description: Create at <host>/user/settings/applications. Needs repo, issue, and PR scopes.

allow_insecure_tls.title: Allow insecure TLS (advanced)
allow_insecure_tls.description: Set to "true" only for self-signed cert hosts. Leave blank otherwise.

read_only.title: Read-only mode
read_only.description: Set to "true" to disable write tools (no issue/PR/release creation). Leave blank for full read+write access.
